shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find tasks -maxdepth 2 -type f | sort && echo '--- README ---' && sed -n '1,240p' README.md
for d in tasks/*; do echo '=== '$(basename "$d")' issue ==='; sed -n '1,220p' "$d/issue.md"; echo; echo '=== '$(basename "$d")' proposals ==='; sed -n '1,260p' "$d/proposals.md"; echo; done
